research_question: Can a portfolio-refresh-only challenger keep the v17 two-signal family and head-extraction smoothing fixed, but add a mild incumbent-retention hysteresis that lowers turnover enough to improve cost robustness without giving back the extraction gains?

score_contract_frozen.score_rule: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5_raw DESC), percentile_rank(liquidity_trend_20_60_raw DESC)); require min_feature_count >= 2

guard_contract.guard_definition: Freeze the calibrated v7 / v17 ranking guard: only rows that are already ranking_eligible_D0 and whose 20-day average amount cross-sectional liquidity rank is >= 0.70 on the same signal_date may enter the ranking universe.
guard_contract.treatment_of_rows_below_guard: Remain in audit tables but must be excluded from ranking_state_daily eligibility.

portfolio_extraction_contract.extraction_definition: Freeze the v17 extraction rule: allocate capital only to ranks 1-10 on each signal_date, apply a deterministic linear rank-decay multiplier, and renormalize selected head weights to sum to 1.0 before cohort scaling.
portfolio_extraction_contract.weight_formula_detail: raw_multiplier(rank) = 1.00 - ((rank - 1) * (0.90 / 9)); rank 1 gets 1.00, rank 10 gets 0.10, ranks > 10 get 0.00

portfolio_refresh_contract.refresh_definition: Keep score family, guard, TopK width, and extraction logic fixed. Across signal_dates, retain an incumbent holding if it still has rank_position <= 15 on the new signal_date and still satisfies the frozen guard plus tradability requirements. Only vacated slots may be refilled from the highest-ranked non-held eligible names until 10 names are held.
portfolio_refresh_contract.replacement_rule: Fill remaining slots with highest-ranked non-held eligible names in ascending rank order until 10 names are held.
portfolio_refresh_contract.target_weight_rule: Equal-weight across currently held names after refresh; unfilled slots remain cash.

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same v17 score family, same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, and same v17 head-extraction smoothing

motivation_from_v17_outcome: v17 materially improved annual_relative_return(年化超额收益), relative_ir(相对信息比率), max_drawdown(最大回撤), and low_liquidity_weight_share(低流动性权重占比) versus v16.
The main remaining trade-off is that avg_turnover_daily(平均日换手) rose materially after extraction smoothing, while topk_perturbation_pass(TopK扰动通过) and cost_stress_pass(成本压力通过) still failed.
disallowed_changes: Do not change score features or score weights.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or its stage.
Do not change the v17 head-extraction smoothing rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not change sample labels or return definitions.
Do not sweep multiple retention thresholds.
Do not sweep multiple refresh rules.
Do not combine this round with additional extraction, weight-penalty, or score-family changes.
notes: This round changes exactly one core dimension: the cross-date portfolio refresh rule.
The purpose is to test whether one mild top-15 retention band can preserve more of the v17 extraction gains after costs by reducing avoidable turnover.
